name: head_flush_single

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Single-line ［＃改行天付き、折り返してM字下げ］ — the leaf counterpart of the 改行天付き hanging block: the first line is flush to the head (天付き, amount 0) and wrapped lines indent by M. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: 和歌の本文［＃改行天付き、折り返して２字下げ］続き

expected.html: 和歌の本文続き
expected.serialize: 和歌の本文［＃改行天付き、折り返して2字下げ］続き
